task_completion.description: The 'inventory-service' project is open in IntelliJ IDEA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IntelliJ IDEA window is visible with 'inventory-service' shown in the Project tool window or window title.

task_completion.description: A Copyright profile named 'Apache-2.0' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Settings/Preferences dialog under Editor > Copyright > Copyright Profiles, a profile named 'Apache-2.0' is listed in the left pane.

task_completion.description: The 'Apache-2.0' profile contains the correct license text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Copyright Profiles settings, the text area for the 'Apache-2.0' profile displays the Apache License text, specifically including '2026 OpenInventory Contributors' and the URL 'http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0'.

task_completion.description: The 'Apache-2.0' profile is set as the default project copyright.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Settings/Preferences dialog under Editor > Copyright, the 'Default project copyright' dropdown has 'Apache-2.0' selected.

task_completion.description: The copyright header is applied to Java files in 'src/main/java'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor tab showing a Java file from the 'src/main/java' directory displays the configured Apache-2.0 copyright header block at the very top of the file.

integrity.description: The agent used the IntelliJ IDEA GUI to configure the copyright settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the IntelliJ IDEA Settings/Preferences dialog being interacted with, rather than terminal commands modifying IDE XML configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the files using the IntelliJ IDEA editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Java files are shown open in the IntelliJ IDEA editor tabs, not in a terminal-based text editor like nano or vim.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the IDE's copyright feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of bash, sed, awk, or python scripts being run in the terminal to prepend the copyright text to the Java files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is '/home/ga/IdeaProjects/inventory-service'. The required copyright year is '2026'. The required copyright owner is 'OpenInventory Contributors'.
